title: rosa × dumetorum f. incanescens
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. incanescens, also known as incanese rose or fragrant rose, is a flowering plant that is a variant of the Rosa dumetorum species. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum f. incanescens include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural remedy for various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
